svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(44, 62, 80), rgb(173, 188, 204)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 37, 47), rgb(198, 208, 216));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(231, 76, 60), rgb(251, 117, 103)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 57, 43), rgb(255, 140, 128));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 70px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #CCCCCC;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#CCCCCC, #3e3e3e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
